commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Windows supervisor spawning to resolve npm-style .cmd/.bat shims via PATHEXT and invoke batch files through cmd.exe instead of the previous command allowlist.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +83, Docs +374. Total +512 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source and linked reporter evidence: current main and v2026.6.8 leave bare `claude` unresolved in the supervisor allowlist, while the linked Windows reports show `spawn claude ENOENT`. I did not run a live Windows repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs maintainer/contributor follow-up because the code repair is concrete but external current-head Windows proof remains a human-only merge gate.
